user.title: Uhale Digital Picture Frame
user.description: Configure a frame. You can change any of this later from the integration's options.

data.name: Name
data.folder: Image folder (local path or mounted NAS share)
data.dlna_entity: DLNA / cast renderer (for the DLNA transport)

data.folder: Image folder (local path or mounted NAS share)
data.dlna_entity: DLNA / cast renderer (for the DLNA transport)

next_image.name: Next image
next_image.description: Advance the folder slideshow to the next image and push it to the frame.

previous_image.name: Previous image
previous_image.description: Go back to the previous image in the folder slideshow.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Re-evaluate the current source and push the image to the frame now.

set_folder.name: Set folder
set_folder.description: Change the source folder (local path or mounted NAS share) at runtime.

send_image.name: Send image
send_image.description: Push a specific image to the frame immediately, by local path or URL.
